agent_tasks.name: mod_bridge_gated_residual
agent_tasks.instruction: Modify bridge feature fusion with gated residual mixing in BridgeInfoLayer. Keep input/output tensor shapes and external interfaces unchanged.

agent_tasks.name: mod_cross_modal_pre_norm
agent_tasks.instruction: Refactor CrossModalTransformerLayer to pre-norm style with residual stability improvements. Keep APIs and tensor dimensions unchanged.

agent_tasks.name: mod_text_sparse_topk_temp
agent_tasks.instruction: Improve TextSparseAttention by adding temperature-scaled top-k masking path with safe fallback. Keep signatures and output shapes unchanged.

agent_tasks.name: mod_image_sparse_topk_temp
agent_tasks.instruction: Improve ImageSparseAttention with temperature-scaled top-k sparsification and numerical stability guards. Keep APIs unchanged.

agent_tasks.name: mod_guide_attention_dual_gate
agent_tasks.instruction: Enhance GuideAttentionLayer with dual-gate fusion between guided and raw attention features. Keep module I/O contract unchanged.

agent_tasks.name: mod_multimodal_fusion_highway
agent_tasks.instruction: Add highway-style fusion in MultimodalFusionLayer to stabilize deep feature composition. Keep all call sites compatible.

agent_tasks.name: mod_bridge_biaffine_norm
agent_tasks.instruction: Improve biaffine bridge branch with normalization and activation redesign for stable gradients. Do not change output interface.

agent_tasks.name: mod_dynamic_router_entropy_reg
agent_tasks.instruction: Adjust dynamic routing path to reduce over-confident collapse, adding lightweight entropy-friendly gating logic in model forward. Keep external behavior compatible.

agent_tasks.name: mod_classifier_fusion_head
agent_tasks.instruction: Redesign final classifier fusion head to combine text/image/global features via lightweight two-stage projection. Keep final binary logits output shape unchanged.
